request_body:
{"presetId":"d0cacdce-0af7-45d0-9302-84c8163d0c49","content":"PROJECT_TITLE:
Agent Frameworks Are Setup Porn, Not Revenue Generators

CAROUSEL_TEXTLINES:
SLIDE 1 (textLines):
Agent Frameworks Are Setup Porn, Not Revenue Generators

SLIDE 2 (textLines):
Agent frameworks are the ultimate setup porn.

Impressive dashboards.
Complex hierarchies.
Zero revenue.

You're not building a business... you're building an expensive hobby.

SLIDE 3 (textLines):
You know what makes money?

Writing better emails.
Creating better offers.
Solving real problems.

You know what doesn't?

A Telegram bot managing your Hermes agent inside your Paperclip dashboard.

SLIDE 4 (textLines):
The engagement trap:

Frameworks like this go viral because they look impressive.

Terminal windows. Complex dashboards.

But impressive ≠ profitable.

It's setup porn, not business strategy.

SLIDE 5 (textLines):
Human companies look the way they do because of human limitations.

Dunbar numbers. Management capacity.

AI has none of these constraints.

So why copy paste the org chart?

SLIDE 6 (textLines):
The wake up call:

If you're spending more time configuring agents than serving customers, you've already lost.

Simplify. Ship. Repeat.

That's the only framework that matters.","mode":"follow","outputLanguage":"auto","enableImageSearch":true,"slideCount":"auto"}

event: page data: {"pageIndex":4,"totalPages":-1,"page":{"pageNumber":5,"title":"Human vs AI Limits","html":"

FALSE CONSTRAINTS

Human companies look the way they do because of human limitations. Dunbar numbers. Management capacity.

AI has none of these constraints. So why copy paste the org chart?
